subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein the Call of the Lord of Creation is raised from the realm of divine unity, without intermediary, and hearing and sight bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم یومیست که ندای مالک بریه از شطر احدیه من غیر واسطه مرتفعست و سمع و بصر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation
